\tzpentry{ID5924}{Curvature Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5924 introduces Curvature Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \frac{d\kappa}{dt} = \alpha |\nabla \Phi|^2 - \beta \kappa \end{equation}
